items.briefing:
Australia's SMS Sender ID Register launched today, making it harder for scammers to impersonate trusted brands like banks or government agencies via text message. This is a significant step in reducing scam SMS attacks targeting Australians. Separately, UpGuard has found that pirate football streaming sites are linked to offshore betting operations, meaning Australians using these sites may be exposing themselves to more risk than just illegal content.

Businesses should also be aware that relying on a single AI provider carries legal and operational risks, according to LegalVision. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected SMS from a known brand, verify it through the organisation's official website rather than clicking any links.

featured.title: SMS Sender ID Register goes live to help protect Australians from scams
featured.quote: New SMS register directly protects millions of Australians from scam texts daily.
